issues.title: Mobile behavior risk detected
issues.explanation: The flow likely degrades on smaller viewports due to layout compression risk.
issues.impact: Mobile users may encounter hidden controls or truncated decision content.
issues.suggestion: Prioritize mobile-first spacing and test CTA persistence across breakpoints.
issues.fixPrompt:
Act as a senior product UX engineer.
Website: https://flowsenseai.vercel.app/
Issue: Mobile behavior risk detected (High)
Context: The flow likely degrades on smaller viewports due to layout compression risk.
User impact: Mobile users may encounter hidden controls or truncated decision content.
Return: (1) exact UI changes, (2) copy updates, (3) component-level implementation steps, (4) measurable success criteria.

issues.title: Primary CTA hierarchy is unclear
issues.explanation: Primary action visibility is low relative to supporting UI elements.
issues.impact: Visitors may explore without committing, lowering conversion intent.
issues.suggestion: Promote one primary CTA with stronger contrast and clear action-oriented copy.

journey.intent: Understand the value proposition before committing attention.
journey.signal: Hero, navigation, and CTA hierarchy were all observed.

journey.intent: Confirm the main action is visible and feels trustworthy.
journey.signal: Pointer movement and CTA density were evaluated.

journey.intent: Check whether the next step explains product value and trust.
journey.signal: Supporting content and social proof were compared.

journey.intent: See if the route to signup, booking, or purchase stays obvious.
journey.signal: Form entry, friction, and navigation continuity were checked. Final conversion confidence was tested.

strengths: Core user intent can be inferred quickly from top-level content.
The journey contains at least one visible route to conversion intent.
risks: Mobile users may encounter hidden controls or truncated decision content.
Visitors may explore without committing, lowering conversion intent.
